name: script-config-in-agent
description: Putting script runtime/inlineScript in the agent block instead of the script block
why: After ADR-0008, script configuration lives in step.script, not step.agent. The agent block is forbidden on script steps — the engine rejects it at registration.
fix: Move runtime and inlineScript from step.agent to step.script. Remove the agent block entirely.
expectedError: agent config is not allowed on script steps
